item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
finally
there was an effort
best day of that customer's life
would be nuts
mmm hmm
it's that episode where dwight is being weird
i mean, i guess
looks like he missed and stabbed a tree
as is tradition
i wonder if they pronounce it vase or vase
it looks like a pretty casual wedding
absolute gold response
i guess
ya ain't cool unless you pee your pants
no need to brag
that's you guys
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Wholesome fun with strangers. Be kind to others.
item.description: So awesome that these people took just a little time out of their day to make an incredible experience for this couple. I hope this makes someone else smile today. **Edit** wow! Was working so late I didn’t even see this went Most Viral. I’m really glad so many others enjoyed this as much as I did. Hope everyone had a great day :)

So confused. ?
YES
I found a collection of weird things men have said about women. Above is the first one.
Number two!
...aaaand number three!
Spiderbro from my house.
David Tennant! <3
Not quite, but still funny
For the trans girls!
Pebbling, love it
I have this. Highly recommend
Ohno
Love this @Knightmage !
A much better take than not saying anything for sure

item.title: Salma Hayek, the actress, turned 58 on September 2nd
item.description:
She is known for such movies as Desperado ...
and The Eternals ...
and From Dusk Till Dawn ...
and Traffic ...
and Savages ...
and Once Upon A Time In Mexico ...
and Frida ...
and Spy Kids 3: Game Over ...
and After The Sunset ...
and Lonely Hearts ...
and Fair Game ...
and The Faculty ...
and many more.

item.title: Why is national independence so important?
item.description: Consider my country Mongolia. It’s located between China and Russia. Two of the biggest countries in the world, they also possess the biggest militaries in the world. No other country in the world can attack Mongolia, as they would have to go through either Russia or China. So in this situation one might ask, why is independence important for Mongolia? Mongolia suffered two hundred years under Manchu rule and seventy years under Soviet Union. What we lost: Lineage tree: Due to these occupations, Mongolians lost our lineage tree and history. Before, every family could, based on their books, tell at least 9 previous generations. We were able to say if we came from Chinggis Khan ancestry or not. Language: during soviet occupation, our written system was abolished. We followed the more “modern” Cyrillic alphabet. in both occupations freedom fighters and people who advocated independent policy were arrested and shot. Chinggis khan and his legacy was forbidden to study during communism Religion: Buddhism (lamaism) was introduced into Mongolia to pacify warlike Mongols So what have we learned from this? If you want your culture, language and traditions to remain with you, keep your country independent. We have a great saying: “Миний нутгийн газар шорооноос бурхан гуйсан ч бүү өг”. “if god comes to you and asks for some dirt from your land, don't give it” Meaning that your country, your motherland is more important than anything else. Btw its also motto of our Border Guards…

item.title: Images of Note: Five African Grey parrots
item.description:
*looks at camera*
This is not the only piss meme in this dump
There's the other one :)
Cursed
I hate it.
guys...do you...do....do you know....do you....
HELL YEAH LINUX!
I remember when twitter was good. That was a lovely day. That day was 20 September 2015 when PIgGate happened.
Every time someone says "getting rid of regulations will make y cheaper", they need someone to ask them "why would they want to make less money than they do now?"
It's Baguette!
Bridgerton!
Brimstone
Basket!
Bridgenorth!
Bremen!
Biscuit!
Breathmint!
Basement!
Backspace!
Broxburn!
Bathgate!
Ever notice how they're banning books written about things like the Holocaust and Slavery over in America? I wonder why they wouldn't want kids knowing that kinda thing? Just a reminder, the second to last living person born into slavery in America died after being hit by a car in 1972.
Boobies really are Superb!
WELCOME TO THE CUM PARK!
if wizards are analogous to computer programmers/hackers, this is the equivalent of shutting down a computer by...er...throwing a brick at it.
Poyo
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Gutenprank

item.title: We made it to one year clean and sober!
item.description:
By the grace of my higher power, the support of my friends and family, the love and compassion of AA members, a lot of rehab and therapy, working The Steps, and my own willingness we made it through one year of not drinking or using. My life is so wonderful today. To all of us out there sick and suffering: you don’t have to drink or use anymore, and you don’t have to be alone anymore. Reach out to me any time. I love you!
Me with my art I did at the 147th AA Cook Forest Conference
Cat tax. This is Daisy Mae Tater Cat.
item.dc:creator: ameebolah
